name: My Digital Twin
description: An AI-powered chatbot that represents me on my personal website. Visitors can have a natural conversation with it to learn about my background, skills, experience, and projects — as if they were chatting with me directly.
role: Sole developer — designed and built end-to-end
infrastructure: Vercel for both the Python serverless backend and Next.js frontend
highlights: System prompt is dynamically assembled from structured personal data (LinkedIn PDF, JSON facts, plain-text notes) so the twin stays accurate without touching code
In-memory session management supports multi-turn conversation across a visit
FastAPI backend deployed as a serverless Python function on Vercel with full CORS and routing config
Originally built with AWS Lambda, API Gateway, S3, CloudFront, and Terraform; later simplified to a pure Vercel deployment
